name: 120 MG  Capsules USP
about: 120 MG Capsules USP is a general medicine that comes in a solid dosage form of tablets. Sourced from India, each capsule contains 120 MG of the active ingredient. It is recommended to store this medicine in a dry place to maintain its efficacy. This medicine is ideal for individuals who need a general medicine for various health conditions.

faq.a: This medicine is a general medicine that can be used for various health conditions. Please consult your healthcare professional for proper use and dosage.
